utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Phoebe , oh my God ! Wh ... wh ... what are you doing here ?

emotion_cause.span: 1_Wh ... wh ... what are you doing here ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: I need to talk to you , it is pretty urgent . It is about Monica and Chandler .

emotion_cause.span: 2_I need to talk to you , it is pretty urgent . It is about Monica and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , would you please excuse me for a moment ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , do you know each other hometowns ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Why do not you ... Wh ... what going on ?

emotion_cause.span: 2_I need to talk to you , it is pretty urgent . It is about Monica and Chandler .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: But , I was just thinking that since those guys just got engaged that maybe it would be nice if they had some privacy , you know ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So , could I just move in with you for a couple days ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Umm , okay , yeah , sure . But wh ... what wrong with Monica and Chandler ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Phoebe , you said it was urgent !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh yeah it is ! I am going to the movies and it starts in like five minutes .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Do you realize I have a classroom full of students ?
